$comment: PLACEHOLDER posting rules — THIS IS EXACTLY WHERE TANYA'S 8 STEPS GO. Each rule maps a source document type to the Debit→Credit account pair to post (docs/deals/TANYA-GL-INTAKE.md, Part 1, the 'Journal entry (Debit → Credit acct)' column). These placeholder rules use standard textbook pairs against the placeholder COA so the engine is demonstrable; they are NOT Frank/GPM's real posting logic. To go live: transcribe Tanya's 8 steps into rules here (one rule per source-doc-type / step), point debitAccount/creditAccount at her real account codes, set placeholder=false. account codes here reference chart-of-accounts.placeholder.json.

rules.description: PLACEHOLDER: accrue a vendor bill on approval — Dr expense, Cr Accounts Payable. Replace expense account + amount basis from Tanya's step for this doc type.
PLACEHOLDER: pay a vendor bill — Dr Accounts Payable, Cr Cash. Replace cash/clearing account from Tanya's step.
PLACEHOLDER: utility bill — Dr Utilities, Cr Accounts Payable.
PLACEHOLDER: rent collected — Dr Cash, Cr Rental Income. (Example non-AP rule; remove if rent posts via the tenant_ledger path instead.)
